company_purpose: Specialty coffee roasting, retail sale of coffee and prepared beverages, and wholesale distribution of roasted coffee to restaurants and cafés in North Carolina and adjoining states.
distribution_policy: Quarterly distributions of net profits in proportion to ownership percentages, after the Manager establishes and retains a reasonable working capital reserve. Distributions that would draw the reserve below sixty (60) days of operating expenses require unanimous Member consent.
transfer_restrictions: Right of first refusal in favor of the Company first and then the non-transferring Member. Transfers to immediate family or wholly-owned entities of a Member are permitted without consent. All other transfers require consent of Members holding a majority of membership interests.
dissolution_triggers: Unanimous written consent of all Members; entry of a judicial dissolution decree; sale of substantially all the assets of the Company; or such other events as the Members may agree upon in writing.
scope_notes: Includes preparation and filing of Articles of Organization; preparation of operating agreement; preparation of engagement letter; one round of revisions to the operating agreement after Marcus and Priya review. Excludes trademark filing for the 'Pine Hollow Roasters' name, securities-law advice (no outside investors contemplated at formation), employment or independent-contractor agreements, and commercial lease review for the Riverside Drive space — those are separate engagements if desired.
